title: Ostend, West Flanders — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ostend, West Flanders: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ostend is a city in West Flanders with a population of 71,000. Belgium’s largest coastal city, offering sandy beaches, a lively promenade, fresh seafood, and a relaxed seaside lifestyle.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
